## Problem

Describe the user-visible problem and why the change is needed.

## Change

Describe the smallest useful solution and any tradeoffs.

## Verification

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] `python skills/monitor-a-share-events/scripts/evaluate_radar.py`
- [ ] `python skills/monitor-a-share-events/scripts/doctor.py`
- [ ] Behavior changes include a benchmark case.
- [ ] README files are updated when user-facing behavior changes.
- [ ] No secrets, private holdings, paid data dump, or access-control bypass is included.
- [ ] Alert wording remains neutral and does not become investment advice.
